name: minimax
description: Official MiniMax MCP plugin — text/image-to-image, text/image-to-video, TTS, voice clone/design, music generation, and local audio playback via the MiniMax-AI/MiniMax-MCP server (MIT, stdio, uvx). Works alongside Claude Code and Antigravity.

interface.longDescription: Wraps the official MiniMax-AI/MiniMax-MCP server (MIT, uvx-launched stdio) into a plugin that exposes nine tools: text_to_image, generate_video, query_video_generation, text_to_audio, list_voices, voice_clone, voice_design, music_generation, play_audio.
defaultPrompt: Generate a hero image for my product landing page
